title: AAA Interview Prep & Coding
description: Prepare for technical game developer interviews: C++ concepts, systems design, 3D math, and whiteboard coding.
learningObjectives: Whiteboard standard CS algorithms and analyze Big O complexity
Resolve common C++ technical questions (virtual tables, smart pointers)

sections.title: Technical Interview Structure
sections.content:
AAA studio interviews evaluate three pillars:

1. **Core C++**: Deep questions on pointers, references, memory allocation, vtable lookups, and modern standards.
2. **3D Math**: Vector trigonometry, matrix multiplications, dot/cross products, and quaternion rotations.
3. **Algorithms/Systems**: Spatial partitioning, collision sweeps, object pooling, and thread safety.

sections.title: Vtable Lookup Interview Question
sections.content:
A classic interview question asks: 'If Class A has 3 virtual functions and is inherited by Class B which overrides 2, how many Vtables exist and how are calls dispatched?'

- **Answer**: Two Vtables exist in memory (one for A, one for B). Calls are dispatched via the instance's hidden `vptr` which dereferences to the corresponding table, locating the resolved function address.
